narration: Witness the electrifying journey of TERMI, India's Valorant prodigy, as he leads Cloud9 to victory in the grand finals. Feel the adrenaline, hear the crowd, and celebrate the triumph with every cheer for T3RM1!
visual_prompts: A wide-angle shot of the grand finals stage with dynamic, pulsating lighting highlighting TERMI in his Cloud9 jersey. The audience in the background is roaring and chanting his name, creating an intense atmosphere.

A close-up shot of TERMI's focused face as he makes a crucial play in the game. The camera angle is over-the-shoulder, showing his intense concentration and the professional gaming setup with multiple monitors and high-end equipment.

A celebratory shot of TERMI and his four teammates hugging and lifting the championship trophy. The background shows the esports arena with vibrant crowd reactions and confetti falling. The lighting shifts to a warm, triumphant glow.
